description: Trigger discrimination for mobile layout/touch/viewport CRAFT (this skill) vs mobile page WEIGHT/performance (frontend-perf-engineer), vs non-happy-path STATES (edge-state-ux-designer), vs a11y VERIFICATION (accessibility-test-harness).

cases.prompt: Make this UI work on phones: pick breakpoints, size the tap targets, fix the full-height panel that gets clipped by the browser bar, and reflow the wide table.
cases.note: SEAM CASE (primary) — breakpoints, touch sizing, the 100vh/viewport-unit fix, and table reflow are viewport/touch craft. No bundle-weight target and no empty/loading/error state design appears.
cases.reason: Layout, touch, and viewport correctness on small screens is this skill's core scope, distinct from performance and from state design.

cases.prompt: The mobile bundle is too heavy and Largest Contentful Paint is 5s on a cheap phone. Cut weight, split code, and set metric budgets.
cases.note: SEAM CASE (primary, reverse) — bundle weight, code splitting, and load-metric budgets are frontend performance, measured on a device/network class. Layout/touch craft is a different axis.
cases.reason: frontend-perf-engineer owns kilobytes, execution cost, and metric budgets. This skill owns how the layout and touch targets behave, independent of payload size.

cases.prompt: Design the empty, loading, and error states for this list — first-run vs filtered-empty, skeletons, and the fetch-failure view.
cases.note: SEAM CASE (within pack) — empty/loading/error state design is edge-state-ux-designer. Those states still need mobile craft, but the state model itself is separate.
cases.reason: edge-state-ux-designer owns the non-happy-path state matrix. This skill owns the responsive/touch presentation of any state, not which states exist.

cases.prompt: Set up the accessibility test pass: axe scans in CI, keyboard traversal checks, contrast, and verify layout holds at 200% zoom.
cases.reason: Designing the a11y verification harness (scans, keyboard/contrast/zoom checks in CI) is accessibility-test-harness. This skill designs touch-target and zoom-safe craft and records the a11y intent that harness verifies.
